title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: A video tutorial covering AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) fundamentals, explaining users, roles, and policies with analogies like "bouncer" and "visitor pass." The video introduces IAM Access Analyzer and emphasizes least privilege as a core security principle.
